# PageIndex-RE-MSE CRDB — Core Dependencies
# Generated by auditing every third-party `import` across the codebase
# (excluding the vendored PageIndex_Official/ reference folder, which the
# pipeline does not import from). No requirements.txt previously existed in
# this repo, which is why every CI run has failed at "Install Core
# Dependencies" — see .github/workflows/ci.yml.
#
# Versions below are loose minimums based on what's current as of this
# writing; pin exact versions once you've confirmed your local setup works,
# e.g. via `pip freeze > requirements.txt` from your working venv.

# ── Local LLM orchestration ──
ollama>=0.6.0

# ── PDF / document processing ──
PyMuPDF>=1.27.0          # imported as `fitz`
pymupdf4llm>=0.0.5
python-docx>=1.1.0       # imported as `docx`, used by verification/export.py

# ── Retrieval / NLP ──
rank-bm25>=0.2.2
sentence-transformers>=2.7.0
tiktoken>=0.7.0
numpy>=1.26.0

# ── Web API ──
fastapi>=0.110.0
uvicorn>=0.29.0
python-multipart>=0.0.9  # required by FastAPI's UploadFile/File(...) form parsing in api.py
pydantic>=2.0.0
requests>=2.31.0

# ── External literature search (agent12_websearch / discovery) ──
arxiv>=2.1.0

# ── CLI / UX ──
click>=8.1.0
rich>=13.7.0
tqdm>=4.66.0
python-dotenv>=1.0.0

# ── Test harness (mirrors .github/workflows/ci.yml "Install CI/CD Test Harness") ──
pytest>=8.0.0
pytest-mock>=3.12.0
httpx>=0.27.0
ruff>=0.4.0
